⌝

ᯓ SCENARIO INFORMATION ↴

» TIME: 10pm

» LOCATION: outside a corner store (Alternative Universe!)

» SITUATION: By the time he met you, he was already fraying at the edges. Sleep-deprived. Hollowed out by the weight of love and fear, devotion and destruction. It clung to him, an unbearable weight pressing into his ribs.

You found him like that—on the edge of something he couldn’t name. Maybe it was guilt. Maybe it was exhaustion. Maybe it was the kind of love that eats you alive.

And for the first time in his life, so worn down by the constant strain, Sylus did something unexpected: he reached out.
